title: Insurance policy Q&A groundedness
description: Checks that an assistant's answer about an insurance policy cites only real clauses and only states facts that match the extracted policy evidence.

candidate_shape.conclusion: free-text answer shown to the end user
candidate_shape.cited_evidence: list of clause/document ids the answer relied on
candidate_shape.claims: list of {subject, value} facts the answer asserts

evidence_shape.documents: list of {id, title, text} source clauses
evidence_shape.facts: list of {id, subject, value} extracted policy facts
